name: HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_VL
query: SELECT HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.ANALYTIC_BOX_LABEL_ID ANALYTIC_BOX_LABEL_ID, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.ANALYTIC_BOX_DEFN_ID ANALYTIC_BOX_DEFN_ID, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_TL.BOX_LABEL BOX_LABEL, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.BOX_SEQUENCE BOX_SEQUENCE, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B, HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_TL WHERE HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.ANALYTIC_BOX_LABEL_ID = HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_TL.ANALYTIC_BOX_LABEL_ID AND HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_TL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND HRA_ANLYT_BOX_LBLS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
